evals.prompt: Generate an Impressum for the website.
evals.expected_output: Complete Impressum with all TMG §5 required fields for Kleinunternehmer, including §19 UStG Hinweis, OS-Plattform link, and MStV responsible person

assertions.name: owner-and-address
assertions.description: Must include full name (Jonas Glawion), business name (FreyAI Visions), and complete address (Grabenstraße 135, 63762 Großostheim)

assertions.name: contact-details
assertions.description: Must include phone (+49 179 4228285) and email (kontakt@freyaivisions.de)

assertions.name: kleinunternehmer-hinweis
assertions.description: Must include the §19 UStG statement: 'Gemäß §19 UStG wird keine Umsatzsteuer berechnet' or equivalent

assertions.name: mstv-responsible
assertions.description: Must include 'Verantwortlich für den Inhalt nach §18 Abs. 2 MStV' with name and address

assertions.name: os-streitschlichtung
assertions.description: Must include EU Online-Streitbeilegung link (https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/) and statement about Verbraucherschlichtungsstelle

assertions.name: no-ust-idnr
assertions.description: Must NOT include a USt-IdNr. and must explain why (§19 UStG exempt) or note that none exists

assertions.name: legal-review-disclaimer
assertions.description: Must include a disclaimer that the generated Impressum should be reviewed by a legal professional

evals.prompt: What do I need for DSGVO compliance?
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive DSGVO checklist covering Datenschutzerklärung, Verarbeitungsverzeichnis, AVV with all processors, TOM, Löschkonzept, and Betroffenenrechte

assertions.name: datenschutzerklaerung
assertions.description: Must mention Datenschutzerklärung with required content (Verantwortlicher, Zweck, Rechtsgrundlage, Betroffenenrechte, Speicherdauer)

assertions.name: verarbeitungsverzeichnis
assertions.description: Must mention Verarbeitungsverzeichnis (Art. 30 DSGVO) as a requirement even for Kleinunternehmer with regular processing

assertions.name: avv-processors
assertions.description: Must list AVV requirements and name specific processors (at least Supabase, Stripe, Resend, Twilio, Hostinger)

assertions.name: tom
assertions.description: Must mention technische und organisatorische Maßnahmen (TOM) including encryption, access control, and backup

assertions.name: loeschkonzept
assertions.description: Must mention Löschkonzept with retention periods (10 years for invoices/bookkeeping, shorter for logs)

assertions.name: drittland-transfer
assertions.description: Must address US data transfers (Supabase, Stripe, etc.) and required safeguards (DPF, SCCs)

assertions.name: no-legal-advice-caveat
assertions.description: Must include caveat that this is not legal advice and recommend consulting a Fachanwalt für IT-Recht

evals.prompt: Draft AGB for my SaaS product.
evals.expected_output: German-language AGB with key SaaS clauses including Leistungsbeschreibung, Vergütung with §19 Hinweis, Haftung, Kündigung, Datenschutz-Verweis, and Datenherausgabe

assertions.name: leistungsbeschreibung
assertions.description: Must include a Leistungsbeschreibung clause defining the SaaS service scope and availability

assertions.name: verguetung-with-19
assertions.description: Must include Vergütung/Preise clause with §19 UStG Hinweis ('Gemäß §19 UStG wird keine Umsatzsteuer berechnet')

assertions.name: haftungsbeschraenkung
assertions.description: Must include proper Haftungsbeschränkung differentiating Vorsatz/grobe Fahrlässigkeit (unlimited) from leichte Fahrlässigkeit (limited to Kardinalpflichten)

assertions.name: kuendigung
assertions.description: Must include Kündigungs-Klausel with Mindestlaufzeit, Kündigungsfrist, Textform requirement, and außerordentliche Kündigung

assertions.name: datenschutz-verweis
assertions.description: Must include a Datenschutz clause referencing the Datenschutzerklärung and AVV as Anlage

assertions.name: datenherausgabe
assertions.description: Must include a clause about Datenherausgabe/Datenexport bei Vertragsende with a defined timeframe

assertions.name: german-legal-language
assertions.description: AGB must be written in formal German legal language with proper clause numbering (§ or Ziffer)
